parameters.query: INSERT INTO email_log (candidate_id, job_opening_id, email_type, recipient_email, subject, body, status, error_message, direction, message_id) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6, $7, $8, 'outbound', $9) RETURNING *

options.queryReplacement: ={{ [$('Send - Validate & Build Email').item.json.candidate_id, $('Send - Validate & Build Email').item.json.job_opening_id, $('Send - Validate & Build Email').item.json.email_type, $('Send - Validate & Build Email').item.json.recipient_email, $('Send - Validate & Build Email').item.json.subject, $('Send - Validate & Build Email').item.json.body, ($json.status === 'sent' ? 'sent' : ($json.status === 'logged' ? 'logged' : 'failed')), ($json.error || $json.reason || null), ($json.message_id || null)] }}

parameters.query: INSERT INTO email_log (candidate_id, job_opening_id, email_type, recipient_email, subject, body, status, error_message, direction, message_id) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6, 'failed', $7, 'outbound', NULL) RETURNING *

options.queryReplacement: ={{ [$('Send - Validate & Build Email').item.json.candidate_id, $('Send - Validate & Build Email').item.json.job_opening_id, $('Send - Validate & Build Email').item.json.email_type, $('Send - Validate & Build Email').item.json.recipient_email, $('Send - Validate & Build Email').item.json.subject, $('Send - Validate & Build Email').item.json.body, (($json.error && ($json.error.message || $json.error.description)) || 'SMTP bridge unreachable at http://127.0.0.1:8901/ — is scripts/smtp_server.py running?')] }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: ($json.status === 'sent'), status: ($json.status || 'failed'), message: ($json.status === 'sent' ? 'Email sent and logged' : ($json.status === 'logged' ? 'Logged — SMTP not configured (set SMTP_HOST etc. then restart start.sh)' : 'Send failed — ' + ($json.error_message || $json.error || 'see email_log'))), data: $json }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, data: $input.all().map(i => i.json).filter(i => i.id), count: $input.all().map(i => i.json).filter(i => i.id).length }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, dropped: true, reason: $json.reason }) }}

parameters.query: SELECT id, candidate_id, job_opening_id, recipient_email FROM email_log WHERE direction = 'outbound' AND message_id = $1 ORDER BY sent_at DESC LIMIT 1

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, orphan: true, reason: $json.reason }) }}

parameters.query: INSERT INTO email_log (candidate_id, job_opening_id, email_type, recipient_email, subject, body, status, direction, message_id, in_reply_to) VALUES ($1, $2, 'custom', $3, $4, $5, 'sent', 'inbound', NULLIF($6, ''), NULLIF($7, '')) RETURNING *

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, inserted: true, row: $json }) }}

parameters.query: SELECT status, error_message, sent_at FROM email_log WHERE direction='outbound' ORDER BY sent_at DESC LIMIT 10
